description: CLI wrapper for whisper.cpp (whisper-cli) local speech-to-text

create.help: Transcribe an audio or video file using whisper.cpp.

arguments.name: file_path
arguments.help: Path to audio/video file to transcribe

options.name: --language
options.help: Language code (e.g., en, es, fr, de)

options.name: --model
options.help: Path to a ggml model file (default: WHISPER_CPP_MODEL or small.en)

options.name: --output-dir
options.help: Directory to save the JSON transcript

options.name: --prompt
options.help: Initial prompt to bias vocabulary/spellings (default: WHISPER_CPP_PROMPT, else none)

models.help: List local ggml model files found in the models directory.

usage_instructions: Use for local, offline transcription of audio and video files with whisper.cpp. Commands follow `whisper <group> <action>` pattern. The primary command is `whisper transcripts create <file>` which outputs a JSON transcript with timestamped segments; add `--word-timestamps` for a word-level array. `whisper transcripts models` lists local ggml models. Output is uniform with the openai-whisper CLI.
